name: Irish Soda Bread #2 Monica Sheridan
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the butter into the flour.
2. Add the salt and baking soda, mix well together using your fingers.
3. Gradually add the buttermilk (or sweet milk) and stir into a soft dough with a wooden spoon.
4. With floured hands, knead the dough lightly until a ball is formed.
5. Turn out the dough onto a lightly floured baking sheet.
6. Flatten the dough into a circle that is 1 1/2 inches thick using the palm of your hand.
7. Make a cross in the center with a floured knife.
8. Bake at 425 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes.
